name: notification-stack
title: Notification Stack
author: Parable
description: An iOS-lockscreen notification pile: cards stack behind the top one with a slight y-offset and scale falloff, new items spring in from the top and dismissed ones swipe/fade out, and tapping the top card fans the stack into a full list and back. Under prefers-reduced-motion it degrades to a plain, static, fully-legible list with no stack transforms, drag, or springs.
